source_name: DISR Resources and Energy Quarterly - critical minerals export value

fields.top_destinations_framing: Top destinations for Australian critical minerals are typically China (refining hub for spodumene → lithium chemicals), South Korea, Japan, and the US. The Critical Minerals Facility / NRF aim to onshore more midstream processing.
fields.primary_source_document: DISR Resources and Energy Quarterly — Critical minerals chapter; ABS International Merchandise Trade for ABS-reconciled values.
fields.keying_plan: Key annual export value A$bn per critical mineral. Pick volume basis (refined vs concentrate vs ore) and cite explicitly. Cross-check ABS at HS-code level.

notes: Awaiting hand-keyed export values per critical mineral. Lithium spodumene exports peaked at >A$20bn during the 2022-23 boom and have moderated; rare earths and copper are growing. Most Australian lithium exports are unrefined spodumene concentrate.
citation: DISR Resources and Energy Quarterly; Australian Bureau of Statistics, International Merchandise Trade.
